text: Oh. Hello. Yes. Hello. Good afternoon. This is Alyssa. I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Illinois State Relief Program. So have you received any notification about these benefits yet? No. Oh, that's alright. That's exactly why I'm calling. I want to help you get these benefits processed before they go unclaimed.
